summary: Bulk merge PR for #2491 and #2494-#2499. The slice shows decomp/matching progress across stage and lb library files, including grheal becoming Matching in configure.py, new matched grHeal and lbMemory functions, substantial grzebesroute data/rodata/sdata2 cleanup, and smaller lbheap/lbsnap/lbarq/lbcardnew improvements. Evidence is mostly diff plus bot report; no human review comments are present.

key_files.role: Marks melee/gr/grheal.c as Matching instead of NonMatching.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: configure.py MatchingFor change NonMatching->Matching for melee/gr/grheal.c

key_files.role: Stage decomp/matching work: adds data block structs, stage data layout, grHeal_8021F180 body, grHeal_8021F70C rewrite, typed access to grHeal_804D6AF0, report/assert data, and coin/next-player/player-joint logic.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report new matches grHeal_8021F180, grHeal_8021F70C, .data, .rodata, .sbss, .sdata, grHeal_8021EFEC

key_files.role: Adds grHeal_UnkData typedef and extern declaration for grHeal_804D6AF0[2].
Stage decomp/data work: adds grZebesRoute_LightData, stage data/report strings, sdata/sdata2 constants, baselib lobj/debug includes, and near-matching grZebesRoute_8020B548 light setup.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report grzebesroute .data/.rodata/.sdata/.sdata2 100%, grZebesRoute_8020B548 99.97%, grZebesRoute_8020B260 100%

key_files.role: Library cleanup/matching: introduces lbArqState return/state enum usage, nodes field access, narrow pragma dont_inline around lbArq_80014ABC, and PAD_STACK in lbArq_80014BD0.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lbArq_80014BD0 improved to 96.55%

Library matching improvement; exact code details not loaded in excerpt.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lb_8001B14C improved to 98.77%

evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lbHeap_80015F3C matched and lbHeap_80015900 improved

key_files.role: Library matching work; exact code details not loaded in excerpt.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lbMemory_8001564C and fn_80015184 matched, lbMemory_80015320 improved

what_changed: PR body is a checklist-only bulk merge for #2491 and #2494 through #2499.
configure.py changes grheal.c from NonMatching to Matching.

grheal.c adds local data layout structs, STATIC_ASSERT size checks, stage data/report string layout, SDATA strings, a typed grHeal_UnkData pointer array, and bodies for grHeal_8021F180 and a rewritten grHeal_8021F70C.

grzebesroute.c adds a light-data struct, stage-data/report-string storage, constants for float/color data, and a C implementation of grZebesRoute_8020B548 that iterates light objects and configures spot/point lights.

lbarq.c replaces raw numeric state indices with LB_ARQ_STATE_* names, changes lbArq_80014ABC to return lbArqState, uses global->nodes instead of casting the global, and uses a scoped dont_inline pragma plus PAD_STACK.
lbcardnew.c, lbheap.c, lbmemory.c, lbmemory.h, lbsnap.c, and lbsnap.h changed, but the loaded diff excerpt does not include their hunks.
Bot report records +5172 matched-code bytes, +2312 linked-code bytes, +984 matched-data bytes, and 22 new matches.

smart_moves.text: Promoting grheal.c to Matching is backed by the diff changing configure.py and the bot report showing grheal function and data sections reaching 100% for listed items.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report grheal new matches

smart_moves.text: Adding explicit local structs with STATIC_ASSERTs in grheal.c documents recovered data layout while preserving size constraints.
Replacing raw lbArq list index literals with LB_ARQ_STATE_FREE/PENDING/DONE improves reviewability of existing list-state logic.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: lbarq.c list[0/1/2] changed to LB_ARQ_STATE_*

smart_moves.text: grzebesroute.c groups related light vectors into grZebesRoute_LightData, making the light setup code more readable than bare Vec3/global-address access.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When matching stage files, recovered adjacent data can require wrapper structs around existing StageData plus report strings, but the evidence should stay tied to section/data layout and size checks rather than becoming a general style rule.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grZe_Route_803E5E0C embeds fmt after StageData-like fields

decomp_lessons.lesson: Use typed local access when the recovered structure is known enough: grHeal_804D6AF0 changes from raw dereference/cast-style access to grHeal_UnkData fields x0 and x4.
A near-matching or matching function may still preserve unusual control-flow shapes when needed by the PR's matching attempt; grHeal_8021F70C uses labels/gotos instead of the previous while loop.

naming_conventions.name: LB_ARQ_STATE_FREE, LB_ARQ_STATE_PENDING, LB_ARQ_STATE_DONE
naming_conventions.convention: Use enum-like state names instead of raw list/state numbers for ARQ node state transitions.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: lbarq.c list and state assignments changed from 0/1/2 to LB_ARQ_STATE_*

naming_conventions.name: grHeal_UnkData, grHeal_UnkVec4, grHeal_DataBlock, grHeal_StageData
naming_conventions.convention: Stage-local recovered structs use subsystem-prefixed names; uncertain fields remain x0/x4 or unused rather than guessed semantic names.

naming_conventions.name: grZebesRoute_LightData
naming_conventions.convention: Recovered stage data structs can use a semantic subsystem-prefixed name when field roles are reflected directly in use sites such as player_pos, spot_pos, upper_point_pos, and lower_point_pos.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: grZebesRoute_LightData declaration and use in grZebesRoute_8020B42C/grZebesRoute_8020B548

assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: lbArq_80014ABC is wrapped in #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop.
lbArq_80014BD0 adds PAD_STACK(16), and the bot report shows the function improved but not fully matched.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Data-layout casts to reach embedded adjacent data
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: grHeal_8021EFEC derives callbacks via (StageCallbacks*) ((char*) grHeal_803E83B8 + 0x9C), and grHeal_8021F70C accesses report_fmt_not_found_next_player through a grHeal_DataBlock cast.
grHeal_8021F70C replaces a simple while loop with explicit labels and gotos, with the bot report showing that symbol reached 100%.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report grHeal_8021F70C new match

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Promote data symbols/constants to match sections
assembly_or_matching_tactics.details: grzebesroute.c adds named float/color constants and report/assert strings; bot report shows .data, .rodata, .sdata, and .sdata2 reached 100% for grzebesroute.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report grzebesroute data section matches

follow_up_queries: Inspect original component PRs #2491 and #2494-#2499 for human discussion and narrower rationale missing from this bulk merge.
Look up full diff hunks for lbheap.c, lbmemory.c, lbsnap.c, lbcardnew.c, and related headers before deriving file-specific lessons.
Search for subsequent cleanup of grHeal_8021F70C gotos or grHeal_DataBlock casts to determine whether these were temporary matching tactics.
Search for later changes to lbarq.h to confirm lbArqState enum ownership and whether PAD_STACK/pragma remained necessary.

evidence_refs: diff_excerpt/raw_diff: loaded but truncated diff excerpt
notes: No review comments or human rationale are present in the loaded slice.
The PR is a bulk merge, so per-change intent likely belongs to the component PRs rather than PR #2500 itself.
The raw diff is truncated; several changed files are known only from changed-file metadata and bot report, not exact hunks.
Bot report supports matching/improvement claims, but no local build logs or objdiff commands are included beyond the report.
Some data-symbol/string changes appear to support section matching, but the slice alone should not be promoted into global data-ownership guidance.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR2500 grheal Matching promotion
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2500 changed configure.py to classify melee/gr/grheal.c as Matching. The bot report records grHeal_8021F180 and grHeal_8021F70C as new 100% matches and grheal .data/.rodata/.sbss/.sdata improvements to 100% for listed sections.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR2500 ARQ state readability cleanup
accepted_candidate_records.text: lbarq.c replaced raw state/list indices with LB_ARQ_STATE_FREE, LB_ARQ_STATE_PENDING, and LB_ARQ_STATE_DONE in queue transitions, while also using lbArqState as the lbArq_80014ABC return type.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR2500 stage light data grouping
accepted_candidate_records.text: grzebesroute.c grouped related light positions into grZebesRoute_LightData and used the named fields in grZebesRoute_8020B42C and grZebesRoute_8020B548.

source_update_candidates.title: Require narrow evidence for retained PAD_STACK and dont_inline pragmas
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2500 uses PAD_STACK(16) in lbArq_80014BD0 and a tightly scoped dont_inline pragma around lbArq_80014ABC. The bot report shows lbArq_80014BD0 improved but not fully matched. Curator should consider whether this PR should be an example under the existing matching-tactics/pragma standards, not a broad endorsement.
source_update_candidates.reason: Loaded standards already warn that PAD_STACK and pragmas need evidence; this PR provides a possible example but lacks author rationale.

source_update_candidates.title: grheal.c reached Matching in PR #2500
source_update_candidates.text: configure.py changed melee/gr/grheal.c from NonMatching to Matching in PR #2500.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a path/status fact suitable for curator review, supported directly by the diff.

source_update_candidates.title: Investigate bulk merge component PR provenance
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2500 only lists checked-off component PRs #2491 and #2494-#2499. Curator may want to associate detailed lessons with the component PRs rather than this bulk merge.
source_update_candidates.reason: Bulk PR lacks human rationale and review discussion for individual changes.

rejection_notes: Do not infer that converting string literals to named SDATA/rodata symbols is generally preferred; this slice shows such changes but lacks explicit data-ownership rationale.
Do not infer reviewer approval or requested changes; the slice has zero review comments and no reviews.
Do not generalize grHeal_8021F70C label/goto shape as preferred source style; it is only supported as the shape used in this PR and associated with a bot-reported match.
Do not derive detailed lessons for lbheap.c, lbmemory.c, lbsnap.c, or lbcardnew.c from this slice alone because their exact hunks are not loaded.
